---
title: "March 26th – What's new in ggplot2 and dplyr"
author: 'Stéphane Guillou'
date: '2026-03-24'
slug: mar2026
categories:
  - workshop
tags: [R, drop-in, help, ggplot2, dplyr]
DisableComments: no
---

For this month's RUG, we will give a quick update on the **latest features in ggplot2 and dplyr**. We will follow with our usual drop-in, collaborative session.

<p float="left">

<img src="/images/uqrug.png" alt="RUG logo" height="100" hspace="5" vspace="5"/> <img src="https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/logo.png" alt="dplyr logo" height="100" hspace="5" vspace="5"/> <img src="https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/logo.png" alt="ggplot2 logo" height="100" hspace="5" vspace="5"/>

</p>

**When:** Thursday 26th of March 2026, 10 am - 12 pm

**Where:** in person (Central Library, St Lucia campus) or online (Zoom)

Sign up to the event [on StudentHub](https://studenthub.uq.edu.au/students/events/detail/6246549).

For more information, reach out to the UQ Library training team for more help: <a href="javascript:void(0);" onclick="copyEvent('copy')" id="copy" title="Click to copy email address">training\@library.uq.edu.au</a>
